stdout:
Table	Create Table
competitions	CREATE TABLE `competitions` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `seasonId` int NOT NULL,
  `title` varchar(256) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `slug` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `description` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `competitionNumber` int NOT NULL,
  `competitionType` varchar(16) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'regular',
  `status` varchar(24) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
  `matchId` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `maxParticipants` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '50',
  `minParticipants` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '5',
  `registrationOpenAt` bigint DEFAULT NULL,
  `registrationCloseAt` bigint DEFAULT NULL,
  `startTime` bigint NOT NULL,
  `endTime` bigint NOT NULL,
  `symbol` varchar(16) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'SOLUSDT',
  `startingCapital` double NOT NULL DEFAULT '5000',
  `maxTradesPerMatch` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '40',
  `closeOnlySeconds` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '1800',
  `feeRate` double NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.0005',
  `prizePool` double NOT NULL DEFAULT '500',
  `prizeTableJson` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `pointsTableJson` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `requireMinSeasonPoints` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `requireMinTier` varchar(16) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `inviteOnly` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `createdBy` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `createdAt` bigint NOT NULL,
  `updatedAt` bigint NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */,
  UNIQUE KEY `competitions_slug_unique` (`slug`),
  KEY `idx_comp_season` (`seasonId`),
  KEY `idx_comp_status` (`status`),
  KEY `idx_comp_start` (`startTime`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci
